fullResponse.name: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
fullResponse.description:
Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values. (i.e., from left to right, level by level).

We use a Queue to keep track of nodes at the current level and explore their children for the next level.

  • Breadth-First Search (BFS) is the primary algorithm used here.
  • We process all nodes at height h before moving to height h + 1.
